Tests for a specific syntax error related to the Function constructor in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a test script that checks the behavior of the JavaScript `Function` constructor when it is called with certain arguments. It attempts to create a function using `Array.isArray` and expects a `SyntaxError` to be thrown, which is verified using an `assert` statement. If no error occurs, the script will fail the assertion. The second `try-catch` block calls the `Function` constructor with `TypeError.prototype` and catches any resulting error, but it does not perform any further actions or assertions. This script is used to validate the correct handling of syntax errors in specific scenarios.
